title: Replication
html:
Q: What kind of failure that Replication can recover? A: fail-stop

Q: What kinds of failures that Replication can't recover? A: bugs, correlated failures, disaster (if replication aren't physically separated enough).

Q: What is it called when a backup replica take control from the primary? A: cut-over.
